title: Syrian Skillet Scramble
description: A flavorful and filling breakfast dish made with scrambled eggs, crispy tomatoes, and savory Syrian spices.

ingredients.name: syrian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most middle eastern markets

instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Add a pinch of salt and a sprinkle of Syrian spice blend.
Heat the xtra virgin olive oil in the skillet over medium heat.
Add the crumbled tofu and cook until it starts to brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes to the skillet and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until they start to soften.
Pour the whisked eggs over the tomatoes and tofu.
Scramble the eggs until they are cooked through, breaking them up with a spatula as they cook.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of Syrian spice blend if desired.
Cook time may vary depending on the size of the skillet and the desired level of doneness.
